reason: Wyndham Catacombs (m30_07). The grace-join arbiter resolves this map's warp grace to Mt. Gelmir because the dungeon sits on the Altus/Gelmir boundary and its warp lands on a Gelmir-side tile -- the same boundary artifact as the known Liurnia/Altus mis-region. The PLACE is Altus: BonfireWarpParam.bonfireEntityId 30070000 -> grace "Wyndham Catacombs", by the Wyndham Ruins in Altus Plateau. gen_data's DUNGEON_REGION_CURATED["m30_07_00_00"]="Altus" is therefore CORRECT and deliberate; this row tells the independent oracle so, instead of silently deleting the curation. (Confirmed by Alaric 2026-07-12.) NB m32_04 (Old Altus Tunnel) is the same disagreement and is curated the same way, but the arbiter cannot adjudicate it (no warp grace), so it needs no row.
